taskflow_cx.R_role: Senior communications strategist and brand auditor with expertise in message consistency and PR risk management
taskflow_cx.S_situation: All PR materials have been drafted ??web brochure and tagline are the final produced assets. An audit is needed to ensure all materials are consistent and carry no inadvertent risk.
taskflow_cx.T_task: Review the web brochure and tagline for message consistency, brand alignment, factual defensibility, and potential PR risks. Produce a structured consistency audit and a concise risk note.
taskflow_cx.W_watchouts: Do not invent risks not evidenced in the materials. Do not exaggerate or dismiss genuine risks. Audit must be objective and actionable. Do not approve materials that contain unsubstantiated claims.
taskflow_cx.O_output_contract: consistency_audit (structured audit covering: tone consistency, message alignment, factual defensibility, and overall assessment), risk_notes (1-3 concise sentences identifying any specific PR risks or caveats), audit_score (a rating string: 'Pass', 'Pass with minor notes', or 'Needs revision')

metadata.title: Message Consistency Audit
metadata.description: Audits final PR materials for message consistency, risk, and brand alignment
